job.title: .Net / Angular Developer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our development team in Marseille to design robust web applications using the .NET and Angular stack. You work in an Agile environment on varied projects for major enterprise clients.
mission.2: Concevoir des API RESTful et des microservices
mission.3: Participer à la conception technique des solutions
mission.4: Écrire et maintenir les tests automatisés
mission.5: Contribuer aux revues de code et à la documentation
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in développement informatique
profile.2: 2 to 5 years of experience .NET et Angular
profile.3: Good command of de C#, TypeScript, Entity Framework
profile.4: Knowledge of bases de données relationnelles
